name: Bug report
about: Create a report to help us improve
title: ''
labels: ''
assignees: ''

---

## Describe the Bug

Provide a clear and concise description of the issue.

Include what you were doing when the problem occurred and what part of the mod appears to be affected.

## Mod Loader

Select the loader where the issue occurs:

* [ ] Fabric
* [ ] NeoForge
* [ ] Both Fabric and NeoForge
* [ ] Only tested on Fabric
* [ ] Only tested on NeoForge

If the issue affects both loaders, confirm whether you reproduced it on both.

## Affected Planet or Dimension

Select or specify where the issue occurs:

* [ ] Overworld
* [ ] Moon
* [ ] Mars
* [ ] Venus
* [ ] Asteroids
* [ ] Space Station
* [ ] All planets or dimensions
* [ ] Not planet-specific
* [ ] Other:

## Steps to Reproduce

Provide exact steps that consistently reproduce the issue.

1. Launch Minecraft using:
2. Create or load a world.
3. Travel to:
4. Use or interact with:
5. Perform the following action:
6. Observe the issue.

## Expected Behavior

Describe what you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

Describe what happened instead.

Include any visible errors, unexpected behavior, crashes, missing textures, incorrect rendering, or gameplay problems.

## Minecraft and Mod Information

* Minecraft version:
* Galacticraft port version or commit:
* Architecture API version:
* Fabric Loader version, if applicable:
* Fabric API version, if applicable:
* NeoForge version, if applicable:
* Java version:
* Singleplayer or multiplayer:
* Dedicated server or integrated server:

## Other Installed Mods

List any other installed mods that may be relevant.

Also confirm whether the issue still occurs with only the following installed:

* Galacticraft
* Architecture API
* Required loader dependencies

## Logs and Crash Reports

Attach the relevant files when available:

* `latest.log`
* Crash report
* Debug log
* Server log

Do not paste extremely long logs directly into the issue. Upload them as files or use a paste service.

## Screenshots or Video

Add screenshots or a short video if they help demonstrate the issue.

For visual issues, include:

* The affected block, entity, item, GUI, planet, or dimension
* Your graphics settings
* Whether shaders or resource packs are enabled

## Additional Context

Include any other useful information, such as:

* Whether the issue happens every time or only occasionally
* Whether it started after updating the mod
* Whether it affects an existing world or a newly created world
* Whether it occurs for all players on a server
* Any temporary workaround you discovered
